allow: PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; $sha = "de7094f"; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/github/repos/snuzeus/commit-to-blog/commits/$sha" -Method GET; $response | Select-Object sha, @{N='msg';E={$_.commit.message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(60, $_.commit.message.Length\)\)}}, @{N='has_files';E={$_.files.Count}} | ConvertTo-Json)
